description: This file defines a React functional component named ExportPage that provides an interface for exporting defect data to CSV. It manages user interactions, displays status messages, and calls backend APIs or fallback client-side CSV generation logic.

methods.name: ExportPage()
methods.description: React functional component rendering the export interface, handling export actions, and managing UI state.

methods.name: onExport
methods.description: Asynchronous function triggered by button click to perform CSV export, handle success/error states, and update UI accordingly.
